item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Clusters 102/103/106/107/110/111/114/120/121/126/127/130 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 4, 05:00 UTC  -  May 7, 21:59 UTC

Apr 16, 18:58 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 04/05/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 21:59 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:
- Filerz1048 Cluster 130 / 04/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz169 Cluster 126 / 04/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz287 Cluster 127 / 04/05/2026 08:00 UTC
- Filerz347 Cluster 107 / 04/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz178 Cluster 126 / 04/05/2026 22:00 UTC
- Filerz44 Cluster 121 / 04/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz478 Cluster 102 / 04/05/2026 23:00 UTC
- Filerz51 Cluster 120 / 04/05/2026 23:30 UTC
- Filerz188 Cluster 126 / 05/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz512 Cluster 111 / 05/05/2026 07:30 UTC

- Filerz196 Cluster 126 / 05/05/2026 22:00 UTC
- Filerz535 Cluster 111 / 05/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz644 Cluster 110 / 05/05/2026 23:00 UTC
- Filerz728 Cluster 106 / 05/05/2026 23:30 UTC
- Filerz201 Cluster 126 / 06/05/2026 07:00 UTC

- Filerz667 Cluster 110 / 07/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz878 Cluster 103 / 07/05/2026 23:00 UTC

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the web hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Multiple filerz/server maintenance notification
item.description:
Apr 17, 12:50 UTC
Completed - The current maintenance has been canceled and she will be rescheduled later.

Thank you for your understanding.

Apr 8, 13:57 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 20/04/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/04/2026 23:00 UTC
Service impact : Concerned filerz/server will be temporarily unavailable for 30 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing an update for the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

List of concerned Filerz:

- filerz804 Cluster129 : 20/04/2026 08:00 UTC

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster126 - Filerz1884 incident notification
item.description:
Apr 17, 11:17 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our has been resolved.

Start time : 17/04/2026 10:38 UTC
End time : 17/04/2026 11:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an issue with the connection to the storage equipment.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 17, 11:01 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Cluster126.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 17/04/2026 10:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz1884 is unreachable on Web Hosting cluster126.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on Filerz1884.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [Global][Domains] - incident notification on .DK domains name
item.description:
Apr 16, 14:44 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Domains has been resolved.

Start time : 07/04/2026 06:30 UTC
End time : 16/04/2026 14:39 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 7, 07:04 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our Domains, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks.

Here is detail for this incident :
Start time : 07/04/2026 06:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .DK domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete).
Please note that websites are still available.
Unfortunately, customers who want to renew their .DKdomains name after the expiration date is already passed will have their websites unavailable.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by our provider.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

Our teams are fully engaged and working to resolve the issue as quickly as possible. We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - Hosting order Incident Notification
item.description:
Apr 13, 16:22 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting has been resolved.

Start time : 13/04/2026 09:30 UTC
End time : 13/04/2026 14:20 UTC
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 13, 15:36 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/04/2026 09:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their purchases on Web Hosting.
Customers Impact : Customers who made orders between 09:30 UTC and 15:20 UTC are experiencing their orders being stuck in a blocked state.
Orders made outside of this time window are fully operational.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Please note that websites are still available.

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Email delivery incident notification
item.description:
Apr 3, 12:24 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions has been resolved.

Start time : 03/04/2026 07:20 UTC
End time : 03/04/2026 12:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 3, 11:53 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Services are being gradually restored, but the customer impact is still ongoing.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams remain fully engaged to reinstate the remaining services as soon as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 3, 08:49 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Customers using the Zimbra and EmailPro services are also affected by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 3, 08:49 UTC
Identified - Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/04/2026 07:20 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Mail-out service temporarily degraded.
Customers Impact : Delay or failure in sending customer's emails. Deliveries to specific destinations may be particularly impacted (e.g., Gmail, Orange, or hosted Exchange services).
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 3, 07:46 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering, which is causing temporary functionality issue on MX Plan delivery services.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/04/2026 07:20 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Mail-out service temporarily degraded.
Customers Impact : Delay or failure in sending customer's emails. Deliveries to specific destinations may be particularly impacted (e.g., Gmail, Orange, or hosted Exchange services).
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Start time : 30/03/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 02/04/2026 21:00 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:
- filerz958 Cluster 128 / 30/03/2026 20:00 UTC
- filerz964 Cluster 128 / 31/03/2026 20:00 UTC
- filerz981 Cluster 128 / 01/04/2026 06:00 UTC
- filerz705 Cluster 120 / 02/04/2026 06:00 UTC

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the Web Hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster103 - Filerz866 incident notification
item.description:
Apr 1, 18:26 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offer on Cluster103 - Filerz866 has been resolved.

Start time : 01/04/2026 14:55 UTC
End time : 01/04/2026 18:23 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 1, 15:19 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer on Cluster103 - Filerz866 on the specific region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 01/04/2026 14:55 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : File server 866 is unreachable on Web Hosting cluster 103.
Customers Impact : Customers on temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on Filerz866.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz582 incident notification
item.description:
Mar 31, 09:10 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting has been resolved.

Start time : 31/03/2026 07:22 UTC
End time : 31/03/2026 09:08 UTC

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 31, 09:06 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer on the specific cluster114 Filerz582.

Here are some supplementary details :

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Mar 31, 08:20 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the cluster114 Filerz582.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 31/03/2026 07:22 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz582 is unreachable on Web Hosting cluster114.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
